title: Race-lap pace shock
summary: Summarize lap-wide disruptions using same-race-lap lap-time delta dispersion and extreme slow rates.
rationale: Some variants near the stronger range used race-lap pace shock summaries. Lap-wide slowdowns can affect pit decisions independently of individual tyre wear.
implementation_hint: For each race-lap group, compute median `LapTime_Delta`, positive-delta share, dispersion, high-quantile positive delta, and extreme-slow rate. Add own-minus-median and lap-shock-with-tyre-pressure interactions.
expected_effect: Small ROC AUC gain with medium confidence.
risk: Lap-wide shocks can reflect safety cars or traffic not explicitly observed; same-lap aggregation must be target-free and row-aligned.
